[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0011110 4
1 1111110 6
2 0010000 1
3 0001000 1
4 1101000 3
5 1010101 4
6 0111000 3
7 0011110 4

01 10 1000011 3
12 21 0100110 3
23 32 1100000 2
34 43 1101110 5
45 54 0011000 2
56 65 1100000 2
67 76 1000110 3
70 07 1010101 4 match 5

02 20 1100101 4
13 31 1000110 3
24 42 0001110 3
35 53 1110110 5
46 64 1111000 4
57 75 0100110 3
60 06 0010011 3
71 17 0010110 3

03 30 0000101 2
14 41 0101000 2
25 52 0010110 3
36 63 0010110 3
47 74 0111110 5
50 05 1110011 5
61 16 1010000 2
72 27 0110000 2

04 40 1101011 5
15 51 0110000 2
26 62 1110110 5
37 73 1010000 2
